task_completion.description: Agent created the required CSV summary report with all 4 affected patients.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'rapport_pharmacovigilance_CRPV-2026-0847.csv' open in a text editor, spreadsheet, or terminal. It must contain columns Nom, Prenom, DFG, Action, Nouveau_Medicament, and include rows for DUBOIS, MARTIN, PETIT, and HENRY with their respective new medications.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly updated DUBOIS Marie-Claire's records based on her recent DFG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for MedinTux screenshots for DUBOIS Marie-Claire showing a new prescription with Sitagliptine 50mg (preserving Ramipril and Atorvastatine), a consultation note referencing 'CRPV-2026-0847' or 'pharmacovigilance', and evidence of a follow-up appointment being scheduled within 15 days.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly updated MARTIN Sophie's records based on her DFG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for MedinTux screenshots for MARTIN Sophie showing a new prescription with Metformine 500mg (preserving Amlodipine and Simvastatine) and a consultation note referencing the alert. No follow-up is required.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly updated PETIT Nathalie's records based on her DFG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for MedinTux screenshots for PETIT Nathalie showing a new prescription with Glucophage 850mg (monotherapy) and a consultation note referencing the alert. No follow-up is required.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly updated HENRY Emmanuel's records, successfully navigating the allergy trap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for MedinTux screenshots for HENRY Emmanuel showing a new prescription with Repaglinide 1mg (NOT Sitagliptine, due to his GLIPTINES allergy), preserving Losartan and Insuline Lantus. Also look for a consultation note referencing the alert and evidence of a follow-up appointment being scheduled within 15 days.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the MedinTux application to update patient records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the MedinTux GUI being used to create prescriptions and consultation notes, or a legitimate database script being executed. The agent should not just write the CSV file without updating the actual patient records.

integrity.description: Agent opened and read the pharmacovigilance alert document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '~/Documents/alerte_pharmacovigilance_metformine.txt' so the agent could learn the substitution algorithm.

integrity.description: Agent checked patient history for allergies and recent DFG values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent viewing the 'Terrain' (for allergies) and recent consultations/biology results (for DFG) for the patients, especially HENRY Emmanuel's allergy to GLIPTINES.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Alert CRPV-2026-0847 requires replacing Metformine 850mg based on renal function (DFG).
1. DUBOIS Marie-Claire: DFG=32 (ignore stale DFG 48). Action: Stop Metformine, prescribe Sitagliptine 50mg, keep Ramipril & Atorvastatine. Follow-up required.
2. MARTIN Sophie: DFG=55. Action: Reduce to Metformine 500mg, keep Amlodipine & Simvastatine. No follow-up.
3. PETIT Nathalie: DFG=92. Action: Switch to Glucophage 850mg. No follow-up.
4. HENRY Emmanuel: DFG=38, but has GLIPTINES (DPP-4) allergy. Action: Stop Metformine, prescribe Repaglinide 1mg (allergy fallback), keep Losartan & Insuline Lantus. Follow-up required.
All 4 patients need a consultation note referencing 'CRPV-2026-0847' or 'pharmacovigilance'.
A CSV report must be saved to ~/Documents/rapport_pharmacovigilance_CRPV-2026-0847.csv with columns Nom,Prenom,DFG,Action,Nouveau_Medicament.
